title: stachys saxicola subsp. saxicola
intro: Stachys saxicola subsp. saxicola, also known as mountain betony, is a perennial plant species in the mint family Lamiaceae, characterized by its distinctive foliage and purple flowers. The medicinal properties of mountain betony include its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which have been used to treat a variety of ailments. The health benefits of consuming mountain betony include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, relieve stress and anxiety, and provide relief from respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Mountain betony can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote relaxation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system.
